The interactive map and zone-click experience is in the live version — link below.

Lorson Ranch / Bradley
EPC-S012
 Evacuation Order

Wildfire approaching from the south. Residents must leave immediately via Powers Blvd north.

Issued 13:42  ·  ~4,800 residents
Black Forest North
EPC-N004
 Evac Warning

Be prepared to leave on short notice. Pack go-bags, fuel vehicles, monitor conditions.

Issued 14:15  ·  ~7,200 residents
Falcon West
EPC-E021
 Air Quality

Heavy smoke from southern fire. Sensitive groups should remain indoors with windows closed.

 

Example result — searching "4720 Lorson Ranch Pkwy"

Address

4720 Lorson Ranch Parkway

Colorado Springs, CO 80925  ·  Parcel 6401303008  ·  Zone EPC-S012

EVACUATION ORDER — Leave now.

Your address is inside an active evacuation zone. Leave immediately. Do not wait for further instruction.

Route: Take Powers Boulevard north toward Briargate. Avoid Highway 115 — emergency vehicles only.

Bring: Identification, medications, pets, phone charger, important documents. Leave everything else.

Shelter: American Red Cross shelter open at Sand Creek High School, 7005 N Carefree Cir. Pet-friendly.

Connected records

Every document, permit, meeting item, and notice attached to this parcel.

📄 Evacuation Order
Order EVAC-2026-0047 — Lorson Ranch Mandatory Evacuation
PDF · Issued 13:42 · El Paso County Sheriff
🚧 Road Closure
Highway 115 closed southbound from Powers to Penrose
Permit ROAD-2026-1108 · Active
🏠 Shelter Activation
Sand Creek High School emergency shelter opened
Activation 14:00 · Red Cross + EPC
📅 Meeting Item
BoCC Emergency Session — Wildfire Response
Today 16:00 · Item 3 on agenda

Email + optional SMS, bound to this parcel. No marketing, no county-wide spam.
